ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fish_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the fish species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the fish species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the fish species */,
  "species_description" TEXT /* Description of the fish species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, threatened) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_stages" (
  "life_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life stage */,
  "life_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the life stage (e.g., Summer Juveniles, Winter Juveniles) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the life stage */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the life stage */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Average growth rate for the life stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stream */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the stream in kilometers */,
  "stream_description" TEXT /* Description of the stream */,
  "water_quality" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "average_flow_rate" REAL /* Average flow rate in cubic meters per second */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_reaches" (
  "reach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream reach */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream the reach belongs to */,
  "reach_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream reach */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the stream reach in kilometers */,
  "reach_description" TEXT /* Description of the stream reach */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., riffle, pool) */,
  "habitat_quality" REAL /* Quality of the habitat */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity estimate */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish species */,
  "life_stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the life stage */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream */,
  "reach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream reach */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity estimate */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error of the capacity estimate */,
  "ci" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the capacity estimate */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the capacity estimate */,
  "estimation_date" TEXT /* Date when the capacity was estimated */,
  "estimated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the estimation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_estimates_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES fish_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_estimates_estimated_by FOREIGN KEY ("estimated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_estimates_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_estimates_life_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("life_stage_id") REFERENCES life_stages ("life_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_estimates_reach_id FOREIGN KEY ("reach_id") REFERENCES stream_reaches ("reach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geospatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial data entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geospatial data (e.g., shapefile, GeoJSON) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the geospatial data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the geospatial data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geospatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_data" (
  "stream_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream data entry */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data for the stream (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the stream data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stream_data_stream_id FOREIGN KEY ("stream_id") REFERENCES streams ("stream_id")
)
